text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 60 

CRNRY_CARE_IND_CD 

LABEL: Coronary Care Unit (CCU) Indicator Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating that the beneficiary has spent time under coronary care during the stay. It also 
specifies the type of coronary care unit. 

SHORT NAME: CRNRY_CD 

LONG NAME: CRNRY_CARE_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: Missing/null = No coronary care indication C 
0 =
